name: claude-usage-bar
description: Live Claude Code session (5h) and weekly usage, straight from Claude's usage API, as bars in the VS Code status bar.

claudeUsageBar.refreshSeconds.description: How often to poll Claude's usage API. The endpoint tolerates one call every 2.5 minutes, which is the minimum and the default. All VS Code windows share a single poll at this rate rather than each polling separately, and the window-focus refresh is served from that shared read.

claudeUsageBar.showPercent.description: Show the numeric percentage next to each bar.

claudeUsageBar.claudeHome.description: Path to the .claude directory, where the Claude Code sign-in token is read from. Empty means ~/.claude.

claudeUsageBar.barCells.description: Width of each bar, in characters. Each cell renders 8 sub-steps of fill.

claudeUsageBar.colors.markdownDescription: Bar colours as hex strings. Applied to the status bar item's foreground. Any key you omit keeps its default.

yellow.description: At or above the yellow threshold.

orange.description: At or above the orange threshold.

red.description: At or above the red threshold.

claudeUsageBar.thresholds.markdownDescription: Fill fractions (0-1) at which each colour takes over. Any key you omit keeps its default.
